DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO QUASH THE SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM -- NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS DENIED. THE CLAIMS OF PRIVILEGE ASSERTED BY THE DEFENDANT ARE OVERRULED. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF MICHAELA REYMAN IS THE BENEFICIARY AND PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF JOHN ROBERT REYMAN AND THEREFORE AUTHORIZED TO OBTAIN THE MEDICAL RECORDS. THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, SAN FRANCISCO, LANGLEY PORTER PSYCHIATRIC HOSPITAL, IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE THE RECORDS DESCRIBED IN THE JUNE 13, 2004 SUBPOENA ISSUED BY PLAINTIFF MICHAELA REYMAN WITHIN 5 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ORDER. (610/CHAN)
